name: Szechuan Beef/Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Beef, cooked, cut into 2-1/2 x 1-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, dissolve cornstarch in sherry, oyster sauce, and water; add red pepper flakes.
2. In a wok or large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add ginger and garlic. Stir-fry for 1 minute. Add broccoli and stir-fry for 3 minutes. Add red pepper, celery, and green onions. Stir-fry for 3 minutes. Add the cornstarch mixture and beef. Stir-fry for 3 minutes. Place on a platter. Garnish with green onion flowers if desired and serve with rice.
4 Servings. (344 calories per serving, 19 grams fat)
